AgentSandboxes.description: Enables the Agent Sandboxes feature, to run AI agents in sandboxed environments, isolated from the host system

<API_KEY>.description: When enabled, the settings UI is blocked when the engine is in certain states

BuildsViewGABanner.description: Displays a sign-up form for next generation Docker build
BuildsViewGABanner.userFacingDescription: Displays next gen Docker build sign-up

ContainerdBuildxForWindows.description: Enables containerd and buildx for Windows containers

ContainerdEnableAfterReset.description: Enables the containerd image store when the user resets data

ContainerdEnableByDefault.description: Enables the containerd image store by default on new installations

CreateContainer.description: Enables the new create a container in the GUI feature

<API_KEY>.description: Enables the customizable Docker Desktop side navigation

DDSV2Theme.description: Enables new DDS V2 theme for Docker Desktop

DDUpgradeButton.description: Enable the new upgrade button in DD sidebar

DashboardOutdatedVersionBanner.description: Enable a banner shown on the dashboard when the running version is severely outdated

DashboardSettingsSyncV2.description: Switches to dynamic method for settings sync

DefaultHostOnlyPortBinding.description: Allow the setting for default host-only port binding to take effect

DesktopAgentsTab.description: Enable the Agents tab in the dashboard

DesktopCagent.description: Enable docker-agent-backed GUI in Docker Desktop

DesktopContentSecurityPolicy.description: Set a Content Security Policy for Desktop

DesktopMarlinTracking.description: Use Marlin for Docker Desktop usage tracking

DesktopMonitorTracking.description: Allow the user to monitor analytics emitted by Docker Desktop

DesktopTerminal.description: Enables the terminal in Docker Desktop

DockerFileStepMetadata.description: Enables Dockerfile step metadata in Builds view

ElectronDockerEngineClientV2.description: Enables a new implementation of the communication between the dashboard and the Docker socket

ElectronGuiModule.description: Allow updating Electron UI as a module

ElectronNetworkClientV2.description: Enable new network client implementation in the dashboard

GordonChatNonLogin.description: Allow sending first message to Gordon without logging in

HideSkipBtn.description: Hides the skip button when the sign in modal displays.

InferenceAvailable.description: Makes the inference engine setting available

LearningCenterAIML.description: Enables the AIML section in the Learning Center

LocalModelChatV2.description: Enables the Local Model Chat feature with MCP support

LocalSandboxes.description: Enables the Local Sandboxes feature, to easily create sandboxed environments to run arbitrary code in

LoginPromptV2.description: Enables the new UI for the login prompt

LoginUpdatePrompt.description: Enables the new UI for the login prompt via updates

LogsTab.description: Enables the consolidated Logs core tab

MCPOnboardingM1.description: Enable MCP onboarding walkthrough and new UI

MCPWorkingSets.description: Enable the new MCP Profiles feature (Previously known as Working Sets)

McpGatewayOAuth.description: Enable OAuth support in the MCP Gateway

McpOauthDcr.description: Enable Dynamic Client Registration (DCR) for automatic OAuth client setup in MCP servers

MinimumWSLVersion.description: Enables the minimum WSL version check

NightlyBuilds.description: In the GUI, show the 'use nightly builds' setting

<API_KEY>.description: Display the offload idle timeout configuration

OnboardingHomeTab.description: Enables the new onboarding home tab

ProUser.description: You can upgrade your current tier [here](URL)
ProUser.label: personal

ScoutHealthScoresDesktop.description: Display Scout Health Scores for remote images

ScoutLegacyPlansAreDeprecated.description: Enable UI reflecting new plans/that legacy plans are deprecated

ScoutNewLayersListUI.description: Enable the new UI for the layer view list

<API_KEY>.description: Allow both Linux and Windows containers simultaneously using docker cli contexts

Stage.description: Connect to hub-stage.docker.com instead of hub.docker.com. Must quit and re-open Docker Desktop to take effect

TrackUIViews.description: Normalized UI view tracking, including page (route) and feature views

UpdateNetworkAwareDownloads.description: Enables cancelling and resuming automatic downloads based on network conditions

UpdateWindowsPrepareUpdate.description: Enables prepare update after download on Windows

VolumesCloudBackup.description: Enables Volumes Backup to the cloud in Docker Desktop
